A A

A focused French verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 2,700+ verb usages with real example sentences
  • All major tenses — présent, passé composé, imparfait, futur, conditionnel, subjonctif
  • Smart drills and flexible verb filtering
  • Voice dictation with instant feedback 🎤
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

French Verb Mnemonics & Tips

-ER Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: e, es, e, ons, ez, ent

Rhyme: “Je -e, Tu -es, Il -e... Nous -ons, Vous -ez, Ils -ent.”

Example: parler → je parle, tu parles, il parle, nous parlons...

-IR Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: is, is, it, issons, issez, issent

Phrase: "IS, IS, IT – ISSONS, ISSEZ, ISSENT"

Example: finir → je finis, tu finis, il finit, nous finissons...

-RE Verbs Mnemonic

Mnemonic: s, s, –, ons, ez, ent

Note: “Il/Elle gets nothing — they’re shy.”

Example: vendre → je vends, tu vends, il vend, nous vendons...

Boot Verbs (Stem-changing)

Mnemonic: Think of a boot shape covering forms: je, tu, il/elle, ils/elles

Rule: Stem changes apply inside the boot, but not to nous and vous.

Example: acheter → j’achète, tu achètes, nous achetons

Quick Help

  • Tap almost anywhere to reveal the answer, then tap again to move on.
  • Use Settings to choose which tenses and which verb ranges are in play. If you are starting out, use Top 50 verbs with the most common tenses.
  • Hear plays the prompt before reveal and the answer after reveal. Say lets you answer aloud and get dictation feedback.
  • Usage shows or hides the example lines while you drill. Most French text is playable, including usages and verb details.
  • Search opens any verb and its full conjugation table.
